message:
fix(tests): resolve Rust nightly compatibility and improve reliability

Address several issues in end-to-end tests for Rust nightly compatibility
and improved test reliability:

e2e_create_output.rs:
- Use bin.as_os_str() instead of &bin for Command::new() to avoid the
  unstable 'str_as_str' feature that was causing compilation failures
  on Rust nightly

e2e_history_restore_prune.rs:
- Add #![allow(clippy::naive_bytecount)] to suppress pedantic lint
  warning about byte counting performance (acceptable in tests)
- Improve backup recovery test reliability by waiting 1100ms between
  operations to ensure distinct backup timestamps
- Fix backup file selection to use the latest backup (last in sorted
  list) for more predictable test behavior

e2e_history.rs:
- Apply same timing fixes for backup test reliability
- Improve assertion formatting for better error messages
- Fix backup selection to use newest backup consistently

e2e_labels.rs:
- Fix JSON field name assertions: use 'label' instead of 'name' to
  match actual API schema
- Improve assertion formatting and add clearer error messages
- Move use statement to proper location at function start
- Add note about dataset state variability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
